title: Aleo Bug Bounty

audit.reason: The report provides a detailed analysis of potential vulnerabilities in Aleo's smart contracts and protocols, using both static and dynamic analysis tools, as well as manual code reviews. The findings are clearly documented, and the recommendations are specific and actionable.
audit.improvements: The report could include more detailed descriptions of the Proof of Concept sections for both findings, providing more context and steps to reproduce the vulnerabilities. Additionally, including a section on how the vulnerabilities were mitigated or fixed would strengthen the report.
